relationships: kab:Tom ur yelli ara akked Mary akken ilaq
kab:Ur yelli ara akk yessefk ad teg mary aya
kab:Inna-d Tom dakken ur yelli ara weḥd-s
kab:Ur yelli ara deg telzemt ass-a, neɣ yella﹖
kab:Ur yelli ara yessefk ad d-tased ɣer da
kab:Iɣal Tom dakken ur yelli ara weḥd-s
kab:Tom ur yelli yezmer ad d-yini acemma sdat medden
kab:Ur yelli ara yesɛa Tom idrimen ilaqen
kab:Ur yelli kra yellan deg yifassen-is
kab:Ula d Tom ur yelli ara yettmeslay tafṛansit
kab:Ur yelli ara yessefk ad teddu ɣer uxxam ɣef uḍar
